overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt of Rivia walking through a sunlit rural countryside with flowering trees, wildflowers, and dirt paths. The character approaches a fork, takes the right path past wooden fences, and passes under an ancient stone archway bridge.

scene_state.functional_zone: rural countryside path with flowering trees and wildflowers

events.description: character approaches fork in path and turns right onto narrower trail

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along the dirt path through sunlit flowering countryside

entered.detail: winding dirt trail through grassy fields
trees with white blossoms lining the path
colorful red and purple wildflowers along path edges
lush green grass covering the countryside

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks along a sunlit dirt path through open countryside filled with flowering trees and wildflowers. The camera follows from behind as he approaches a fork in the road and takes the right path.

scene_state.functional_zone: fenced country path with cypress trees

events.description: large stone archway bridge becomes visible in the distance ahead

agents.ego_description: continuing along the right fork path passing wooden fences on the right

entered.detail: rustic wooden fence lining the right side of the path
tall narrow evergreen trees in the distance
ancient stone bridge with multiple arches spanning the path

segments.scene_description: The path continues past wooden fences with cypress trees visible in the distance. A large stone archway structure appears ahead as the character walks toward it.

scene_state.functional_zone: ancient stone archway bridge over path

events.description: character walks under the stone archway bridge, entering shaded area

agents.ego_description: walking under the large stone archway and continuing along the path into a more wooded area

entered.detail: weathered stone wall of the archway structure

segments.scene_description: Geralt approaches and passes under the ancient stone archway, moving from bright sunlight into dappled shade. The wooden fences fall behind as the path continues past cypress trees and stone walls.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a sunlit rural landscape that transitions from open wildflower fields into the dappled shade of an ancient stone structure. It begins with the camera trailing Geralt along a dirt path lined with flowering trees, following him as he reaches a fork and steers toward the right. As the path continues, the open scenery shifts to a more enclosed route bordered by wooden fences with distant cypress trees appearing on the horizon. The scene then leads the character toward a massive stone archway, moving from the bright glare of the sun into a cool, shaded passage. Finally, the camera passes under the arch as the wooden fences recede, leaving the path to wind past stone walls and towering cypress trees.
